text:
Once there was a mermaid who loved human stories. Every evening after her regular work as a sea nymph caretaker, she'd slip into the depths and weave tales for the fish.

The mermaid's favorite story was a heroine named Amelia. Amelia would rescue lost sea kittens with her magic nets. Each time she did this, her heart grew warmer.

One day, when she wasn't expected back underwater until dawn, Amelia saw a kitten struggling onto a sandy shore. She swooped it up and hurried home.

"I'm sorry, little one," Amelia murmured. "Don't worry. We'll have a cozy little bed for you." She began to knit tiny hammocks. Eventually, the kittens loved her hammocks so much they came every night.

As Amelia wove each thread with love, she noticed that the kittens seemed happier than ever. She decided to ask for something special—a book with Amelia's adventures. That night, she poured her magic into the pages.

The next morning,
